rawProposal:
- Lock every clip to photoreal live-action period look and ban illustrated, anime, painted, cartoon, or smooth CGI skin/faces.
- State exact CAST COUNT and named identities only; forbid extras, background figures, or unlisted people on screen.
- Lock each character’s face, wardrobe, and grooming for the full clip and forbid mid-clip identity or costume changes.
- For silent or no-dialogue clips, keep mouths closed and calm with no open-mouth speech, shouting, or talking gestures.
- Keep prompts complete and ungarbled; never truncate or conflate distinct character identities in the same shot.
- Match specified gaze and expression (e.g., eyes open and facing camera) with naturalistic period-human features, not stylized or downcast defaults.
- Auto-review must fail any frame that drifts from style lock, cast count, identity lock, or silent-mouth rules.

items.text: Lock every prompt to photoreal live-action period look and ban illustrated, anime, cartoon, painted, or smooth CGI rendering.
items.note: Project STYLE LOCK only — not global gen pack (picture-book projects must stay free).

items.text: State exact CAST COUNT and named identities, and forbid any extras, background crowd, or unlisted people on screen.
items.note: In gen pack + auto-review; remaining gap is regen after fail, not new prose.

items.text: Lock each character’s face, wardrobe, and grooming for the full clip and forbid mid-clip identity or costume drift.
items.note: Cast visual_lock + locked refs + project identity rule.

items.text: For silent or no-dialogue clips, require closed mouth, calm face, and no speaking, shouting, or agitation gestures.
items.note: Accepted intent; gen pack allows restrained tension (tight jaw/fist) — not strictly 'calm face'.

items.text: Keep prompts complete and ungarbled, with clear who acts or speaks so the wrong character never performs the beat.
items.note: Full prompts + API shorten-on-length; no packing truncate.

items.text: Specify naturalistic skin, open eye-line, and intended expression so faces do not read shut, downcast, vampiric, or non-human.
items.note: Covered by gen FACE/PERFORMANCE + auto-review #4 ADDRESS/GAZE + #6 FACE READABILITY + project STYLE/PERFORMANCE locks (not a global always-eyes-to-camera rule).

items.text: Auto-review must fail any clip that breaks style lock, cast count, identity continuity, or silent-mouth rules.
items.note: auto_review pack + assembly gate (fails excluded from WIP without override).
